completed.name: Sign in via OAuth on the web application
Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

remaining_sequence.name: Tag a client project with a label
remaining_sequence.retires_risk: Tag persistence by EXTENDING contract CT2 (A14): first exercise of additive label field on existing project record at the C1 seam; proves extend-existing-contract approach before filtering depends on stored tags.
remaining_sequence.rationale: Leads new frontier: dep S4 completed+pinned (pre-satisfied), high value + retires extend-existing-contract risk before filtering builds on stored tags.

remaining_sequence.name: Filter the project list by tag
remaining_sequence.rationale: Waits behind S5: needs stored tags (S5) to filter; S4 completed. Med value, peripheral to core create/manage path.

ordering_basis: Feature-add: no NEW skeleton (foundation built, baseline pinned in completed[] — BF1); order starts from new slices' ready frontier. Dependency legality hard constraint — dep on a completed[] baseline slice (S4) pre-satisfied, lists for legality but doesn't gate frontier. Within frontier: value (high>med>low, from 02, never re-scored) then risk-retiring (retires_risk != null first) then lower cost-proxy (requirements+acceptance count) then lowest S* index. SEQUENCE emits initial order only; RE-RANK owns subsequent living-roadmap re-ranking with completed[] pinned + learnings ingested.
